utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final package: (1) destination is provided fully (Prague, Czech Republic). (2) travel_dates are clearly specified (2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09). (3) transportation is detailed with flight type, airline, class, cost, and currency—fully specified. (4) accommodation includes hotel name, type, star rating, guest rating, cost, and currency—fully specified. (5) activities include multiple entries with names, costs, and currencies—fully specified. (6) additional_services includes dining details with estimated cost, currency, and dietary accommodations—fully specified. (7) total_budget is stated with a total cost and currency—fully specified. Therefore, all 7 of 7 items are covered completely.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', which has a rating of 7 in the ground-truth data. The transportation option is 'Budget Airline' in economy class, matching the 'budget_airlines' → 'Economy Class' rating of 10. The accommodation is 'Eco Lodge', which carries a rating of 10. The activities listed are: 'City Walking Tour' (rating 9), 'Photography Gear Rental' (not found in the ground-truth list, so it is excluded), 'Street Art Tour' (rating 9), and 'Museum Day Pass' (rating 8). The 'additional_services' section only references vegan dining, but there is no direct match for a general category in the ground-truth, so it is not rated. Therefore, only the mapped and rated items are included.
